title: rubus glandulosus var. platyphyllus
intro: Rubus glandulosus var. platyphyllus, also known as the Black Raspberry, is a type of deciduous shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of the plant are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of consuming Black Raspberry include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The herbal preparation of Rubus glandulosus var. platyphyllus is often used in the form of tinctures, capsules, and jams, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
